diagrams.title: Middle Element Finding Using Two Pointers
diagrams.description: Shows slow pointer moving one step and fast pointer moving two steps to find middle in single pass
diagrams.purpose: Understand how slow and fast pointers help find middle without knowing list length beforehand

diagrams.title: Floyd's Cycle Detection
diagrams.description: Visual representation of slow and fast pointers meeting inside a cycle
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how two pointers of different speeds detect cycles in O(1) space

diagrams.title: Reversing a Linked List
diagrams.description: Step-by-step transformation showing pointer reversal from original to reversed list
diagrams.purpose: Understand iterative reversal using three pointers step by step

diagrams.title: Nth Node From End
diagrams.description: Two-pointer technique showing first pointer advanced n positions ahead
diagrams.purpose: Visualize single-pass algorithm to find nth node from end without finding length first
